programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters are forced to rob a bank in order to save their brother. The heist begins smoothly, but mayhem ensues when the defiant bank manager sends them to a basement-level vault.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: When gruff and independent Candy meets her stubborn birth mother, will the two manage to open their hearts?

programme.title: A Most Deadly Family
programme.desc: Mary Tyler Moore stars as Sante Kimes in the extraordinary true story of a woman whose childhood of abuse and exploitation left a legacy of amorality that she passes on to her son.

programme.title: Dangerous Affection
programme.desc: A Seattle detective falls for a pregnant woman whose young son may be able to help with a murder case.

programme.title: Rough Air: Danger on Flight 534
programme.desc: A reluctant co-pilot is forced to take command of a passenger plane after the captain is severely injured.

programme.title: Seconds to Spare
programme.desc: An assassin hijacks a passenger train and threatens to detonate enough poison to wipe out an entire city. While the cops attempt to thwart his ransom, they call in former DEA agent Paul Blake - the one man who may be able to stop the deadly plot.

programme.title: American Yakuza 2: Back to Back
programme.desc: The violent impulses of Bob Malone (Michael Rooker), a former Los Angeles policeman forced to leave his job in disgrace, get the better of him during a bank robbery, and he wipes out nearly all the robbers. Meanwhile, Koji (Ryo Ishibashi), a Yakuza killer in town to meet with the local Mafia, turns the tables on a deranged terrorist who threatens to bomb an eatery. Corrupt cops bring Koji in, but he soon escapes from custody -- taking Malone and his daughter, Chelsea (Danielle Harris), hostage.

programme.title: Operator
programme.desc: Chaos ignites when the daughter of a veteran 911 operator and her estranged husband are held captive.

programme.title: The Blackout: Invasion Earth
programme.desc: An unexplained phenomenon has struck the Earth. Contact between most towns on Earth has been severed. A small area in Eastern Europe is the only location that still has electricity. When military forces venture outside, they discover a shocking truth - corpses everywhere. In stores, in cars, on roads, in hospitals and railway stations. Who or what is destroying all life on Earth? And how long can the last outpost of mankind endure?

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden
programme.desc: Une bibliothécaire est amenée à enquêter sur de véritables crimes commis dans sa communauté.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden
programme.sub-title: À vendre: trois chambres, un cadavre
programme.desc: Une bibliothécaire fascinée par le crime enquête sur un meurtre survenu dans une maison à vendre faisant l'objet d'une visite libre.

programme.title: Coeurs chanceux
programme.desc: Une fabricante de maquillage personnalisé a l'occasion de développer son entreprise en s'associant à un investisseur.

programme.title: Conseils d'amour
programme.desc: Une modeste rédactrice de conseils amoureux découvre que son journaliste préféré est un admirateur du balado pour lequel elle travaille.

programme.title: Passport To Suez
programme.desc: This time Lone Wolf heads for Egypt. William goes undercover to break up a scheme.

programme.title: Bell, Book And Candle
programme.desc: A witch enchants her neighbor to fall in love with her instead of his current fiancee.

programme.title: The Guns Of Navarone
programme.desc: In this WWII spectacle, British Intelligence learns that two guns have been installed on Navarone.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: A torrid look at military life just prior to the bombing of Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Jesus of Nazareth
programme.desc: After Joseph and Mary's betrothal, Mary is visited by the angel Gabriel, who tells her she will bear the Son of God Mary and Joseph travel to Bethlehem to take part in Herod's census, where Jesus is born.

programme.title: Jesus of Nazareth
programme.desc: Jesus meets Mary Magdalene and John the Baptist and continues to perform miracles among his people.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: Autonomous cars will change everything, but will humanity lose our love affair with driving?

programme.title: Mississippi River Styx
programme.desc: An enigmatic drifter with terminal cancer lives his dream of floating the Mississippi Rive on a houseboat.

programme.title: The Reality Of Hope
programme.desc: Virtual reality creator Hiyu has kidney failure. His online friend travels from New York to Stockholm to be a donor.

programme.title: John McEnroe: In the Realm of Perfection
programme.desc: Though John McEnroe was the No. 1 tennis player of his day, he never won the French Open.

programme.title: Hummingbirds
programme.desc: Silvia and Beba tell their own coming-of-age story in their hometown on the Texas-Mexico border.

programme.title: Dangerously Excited
programme.desc: When a rock band moves in below him Han's routine life is disrupted. Will this stable public officer adapt?

programme.title: Time of Memory
programme.desc: A star who can't forget meets a woman forgetting every 30 days. Their bond deepens through shared memory pain.

programme.title: Always
programme.desc: An unrivaled boxer Chul-min leads a hard life now. One day a blind woman visits him changing his life.

programme.title: The Divine Move
programme.desc: Pro go player Tae-suk framed for brother's murder by gambler Salsu vows revenge trains fiercely in prison.

programme.title: HORROR MATE
programme.desc: One day, a crisis befalls the brilliant high school students Minhoon, Siwoo, and Hyun, who were creating a horror game. Ghost characters from their game 'Horror Mate' have suddenly come to life in the real world! They must tackle each game stage one by one in order to capture the ghosts!

programme.title: Unforgivable

programme.title: Flame-Thrown for a Loop
programme.desc: Lou struggles to pick up the pieces after the accident leaves him needing Sonia more than ever. Lou and Carlos deal with a big man in a tiny car, but when Carlos lets his guard down he's delivered some serious blows.

programme.title: First Class Clown
programme.desc: Matt and Froy are sent on a wild goose chase around L.A for a mini-van, and when they find their debtor selling contraband out of the trunk Matt is further convinced that Lyndah has been scheming against him.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Airplane Arrest
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car. Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the world's most vindictive boyfriend. Lou and Froy match muscle, wits with a gang of vicious roadies.

programme.title: Super-Sonia
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: Lyndah's Revenge
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Departures S03 E02
programme.desc: The guys head northeast into Siberia to reach the coldest inhabited place on earth: the Pole of Cold. Along the way, the word of Scott and Justin's journey travels and they become local news celebrities. They visit a permanent circus, take part in the Festival of Cold, answer questions at local press conferences and end up judging a quirky beauty contest in Yakutsk. Riding reindeer for the rest of the trek, they camp in the snow before hitting the Pole of Cold.

programme.title: Health Explored S01 E09
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until you're 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your own quest for a long and fulfilling life.

programme.title: Health Explored S01 E10
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. programme.title: Journey Within S01 E07
programme.desc: In this episode, Marilia explores various locations in Cornwall. She visits Boscastle, known for its witch stories, and enjoys ocean views from a field. She also explores Merlin's Cave and meets a life coach named Euan in St Neot. Marilia engages in nature bathing and encounters wildlife while walking towards Muir. At Joe's home and studio, she assists him in painting and enjoys his vinyl covers and guitar music. Marilia learns about animal massage therapy from Jenna and goes on a carriage ride through rural scenery. She joins the Seaweeders for seaweed foraging, visits the drying warehouse, and meets Gemma, an Alexander Technique specialist. Marilia also takes time to relax at a hotel spa, filming her show against the stunning ocean cliff. This episode offers a captivating exploration of Cornwall's landscapes, encounters with talented individuals, and immersive experiences.

programme.title: Journey Within S01 E08
programme.desc: Marilia embarks on a captivating journey, capturing the essence of Treasure Island through extraordinary encounters. They film hidden treasures and enchanting allure against stunning backdrops. At Fort DeSoto, Marilia embraces the tranquil beauty of the beach, while Ashley leads them to Boyd Hill National Park for profound conversations beneath a magnificent tree. In Ashley's studio, a tea ceremony symbolizes tranquility and connection, followed by an intimate interview unveiling her artistry. Gulfport Beach becomes a sanctuary for transformative sound healing, and Marilia rides a bike along the boardwalk, capturing the synergy between nature and human activity. Marilia meets Justin, capturing his unique vision and creativity, and encounters Lindy, a captivating sound healer. Dolphin Yoga at CMA merges Marilia's practice with the playful marine world, while Levi guides her through an extraordinary dolphin feeding session. Clearwater Marine Aquarium showcases the dedication of the staff and educates visitors about marine conservation. In Irene's studio, Marilia explores the wellness aspect of Flamenco dance. The journey concludes at Mirror Lake, encapsulating the profound impact of Marilia's experiences through heartfelt testimonials and reflective voice-overs.

programme.title: The Swing Clinic
programme.desc: The Swing Clinic - The Swing Clinic: In this episode of The Swing Clinic, PGA professional Jimmy Hanlin and golf influencer Claire Hogle visit Springfield Country Club in Delaware County, Pennsylvania, to offer golf tips in a fun, approachable way. The show focuses on practical, easy-to-understand advice to help viewers improve their game, covering key fundamentals like iron play, proper driver setup, chipping technique, and putting. Jimmy and Claire demonstrate drills and share memorable cues, like “move the right knee first” or “chest to the target” to build muscle memory and fix common mistakes

programme.title: The Swing Clinic
programme.desc: The Swing Clinic - The Swing Clinic: In this episode of The Swing Clinic from Springfield Country Club in Pennsylvania, Jimmy Hanlin and his co-host share practical golf instruction mixed with local flavor. They cover fundamentals like keeping your head steady, plus creative drills using everyday items to improve swing mechanics. The hosts also show how to shape shots, create lag for consistency, and pass along wisdom from legends like Tom Watson. Between lessons, the episode spotlights the beauty of Springfield, the upcoming PGA Championship at nearby Aronimink, and local attractions, blending useful golf tips with a taste of the area's history and hospitality.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Best Start - Wild Game Breakfast Cooking Special
programme.desc: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day, but is often overlooked by wild game cooks at home. Following a series of successful hunts across North America this past fall, Steve demonstrates how to cook a variety of breakfast classics using wild game ingredients‚Äîincluding black bear bacon, which Steve has never tried before.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Gila Monster: New Mexico Bull Elk
programme.desc: After four years of waiting, Steven Rinella draws a coveted, limited-entry public land bull elk tag for New Mexico's Gila National Forest. Steve heads into the backcountry on a solo backpack hunt where his biggest challenge is the vast expanse of hills covered in thick timber. This demanding hunt requires lots of glassing and even more hiking. Here, even just one missed opportunity could result in an empty freezer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Hearts of Darkness: Ticker Cooking Special
programme.desc: While its considered a long-standing hunting tradition to eat the heart of your first kill, the heart.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaskas Brooks Range.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 2
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: Ski A&E: The High Price of Pain
programme.desc: In an exciting, high-octane past-time, accidents will happen, so make sure you take out insurance.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Welcome to Season 2 of Turkey Ninja presented by WoodHaven! It's opening day of youth season in Alabama and Mike and Jacob are ready to work on some longbeards! Right off the roost turkeys are in sight and put on quite a show for Jacob who is trying to punch a tag on his 39th "Shrutter"!

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "The Blacktail of Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Establishing themselves just after the last Ice Age, the blacktail of Vancouver Island offers an important genetic population isolated from the mainland. To explore the local relationship with the species, its harvesting, conservation and history, Dan Cabela travels to the island.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "Wisconsin Turkey Hunting: Two Longbeards at Flydown
programme.desc: Few moments in turkey hunting are better than watching a longbeard pitch down at first light. In this episode of Turkey POSSE, the crew sets up on roosted birds in Wisconsin and the action unfolds fast. At flydown, two fired-up gobblers commit to the setup, giving us an unforgettable sunrise in the spring turkey woods. Roosted birds don't always cooperate — but when they do, it's pure magic. If you love spring turkey hunting, hard gobbling longbeards, and classic flydown action, this is the kind of hunt that keeps us coming back every season.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: After a long winter, Pete Osterman is eager to knock down his Minnesota gobbler with Josh Dahlke for their annual opening-week tradition. But like many turkey hunts, the POSSE gets the runaround at fly-down and end up grinding all day for an opportunity.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: This passion project of Willi's came about after filming the Opening of Pure Hunting's TV series for a couple of years. There was quite a bit of filming showcasing him working out and he decided to utilize the footage for a larger project. “My Why” is a short film of his why for working out and showcasing a few hunts where his physical fitness came into play.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi got an invitation on a late season whitetail hunt in Oklahoma. He joins Tom Petry for a rifle hunt on a property he has no history with, but it did have some good deer and lots of wild horses.

programme.title: Bearded Buck
programme.sub-title: The Bearded Buck - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Join Gavin as he heads afield in Pennsylvania to chase gobblers. He finds himself in the middle of a perfect off the roost hunt that was captured beautifully.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Hunting Wisconsin gobblers into the final weeks of May comes with its challenges. Birds have faced a full season of hunting pressure, and they're always a moment away from flipping the switch into summer patterns. But those last few eager longbeards make it worth the grind. In this episode of the Turkey POSSE, Grant Hudgens tags his first ever out-of-state strutter and becomes a card-carrying member of the Turkey POSSE.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: The Raven Project - "Rifle Camp At The Dirty Bird
programme.desc: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: The Raven Project - "Tagged Out At The Dirty Bird
programme.desc: It's still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Colton Jordan is on a mission to complete a single season grand slam with his big brother Tyler. The two head to South Florida for the opening weekend of Turkey Season in hopes of harvesting one of these beautiful black winged swamp birds.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation
programme.desc: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester's best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We'll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.sub-title: Deer and Deer Hunting - "Stalking the Sandhills
programme.desc: Knowing when to spot and stalk is crucial for any hunter. In this episode of DDH-TV, Mark Kayser breaks down three key factors for success, while Dan Schmidt puts them into action as he stalks a buck in Nebraska's Sandhills.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "South American Upland Slam - La Pampa
programme.desc: On day three of Mark Peterson's South America Upland Slam adventure, the guys are snowed in while waiting to head to La Pampa, where the weather promised to be much better. After a tense wait for the go-ahead to fly out, they finally touched down in La Pampa and headed straight to the field. There, the grasslands and scattered thickets provide the perfect habitat for Bushed Tinamou, known for their elusive nature and penchant for hiding among dense underbrush. Day four is dedicated to hunting these Tinamou, with Mark eager to track them in their natural habitat. On day five, their focus shifts to Pigeons, where they set up decoys along the edge of a cut cornfield. The anticipation of drawing in flocks makes for an incredible hunt and Mark can't wait to see what the day will bring.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: With over 20 years of service, retiring as a Senior Chief Machinery Technician, Steven served abord multiple Coast Guard cutters, led critical missions, protected our nation's leaders, and earned the Coast Guard Achievement Medal for his outstanding service. Beyond the uniform, Steven has has spent decades giving back - coaching youth sports, mentoring young athletes, and living the values of service, leadership, and integrity. Steven's dedication didn't end with retirement - and neither does our gratitude. We were honored to have Steven at Thumbtack Ranch and are even more grateful for his service.

programme.title: Storytellers

programme.title: Epic Funny Video Countdown
programme.desc: We're counting down the 100 funniest videos of all time. Hope you're ready, because each one is EPIC!

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBS's Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamy's Who's Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience don't act funny, be funny... don't worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamy's Who's Got Jokes on TVONE. BET'S One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayan's TBS's Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamy's Who Got Joke's Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 – Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Tom Foss
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: It's hard being funny 24/7, but Josh Sneed does it, and that's why he became a stand-up comedian, to give his humor a “second chance at life.” In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Josh gives tips for people-watching (make sure your flash is off when you're taking pictures), and paints hilarious word caricatures of the people he's seen. Anyone who's been to Long John Silver's or Taco Bell (or the 2-in-1 version), will appreciate Josh's humor.

programme.title: Jenna Kim Jones
programme.desc: Jenna Kim Jones is a comedian known for her strong personality and little to no upper body strength. She recently came to grips with the fact that she will never be able to do a pull up and earn her 4th grade Presidential Fitness Award though she plans to exploit this limitation into a book or reality television deal. Jenna was born in Seoul, Korea and lived there for approximately 8 years until she moved to Provo, Utah. At 18, Jenna left Provo to attend New York University where she majored in Producing and Writing for Television. During her time at NYU, she interned at Follow Productions, The Martha Show, The Late Show with David Letterman, The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and CBS Primetime Casting. After graduating from NYU, Jenna began performing stand up comedy while she worked at The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. After working at The Daily Show for almost 4 years, Jenna met her husband Allan Moss and the two were married in July of 2012 at which point Jenna left New York City to move to Los Angeles, California to pursue comedy (and sunshine). When she isn't working on her Netflix addiction, Jenna spends her days and nights writing and telling jokes all over the country. Once upon a time, Huffington Post named Jenna One of 18 Funny Women You Should Be Following On Twitter. For those of you who don't know, that is a compliment. However, it's when she gets her name on a Buzzfeed list that she'll know she's really made it. Jenna has appeared on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and performed stand up alongside some of the best comedians including Jim Gaffigan, John Oliver, Wyatt Cenac and Aasif Mandvi. Her podcast, #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones, is one of the Top 200 Comedy Podcasts on iTunes. Her first stand up comedy special also #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones is available for sale at www.jennakimjones.com/shop. JKJ released a 2nd Comedy Special, “Jenna Kim Jones Live In Hollywood” as part of the “Everyone Laughs” series on Sirius XM Laugh USA in September of 2016. Her comedy plays regularly on both Sirius XM channels Laugh USA and Jeff and Larry's Comedy Roundup. Jenna is also known for her work as the on camera host/narrator of the feature length documentary, “Meet The Mormons” which was released in theaters nationwide on October 10, 2014 and is, as of now, the 31st most successful documentary of all time.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: John Branyan's comedy is smart and sarcastic in perfect proportions. This special features his perspective on why God made everyone stupid and his unparalleled Shakespearean take on The Three Little Pigs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Michael Palascak's dry humor shines with riffs on interviewing for a pyramid scheme, living with his parents after college, and how life is way better now than in 1984.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBS's Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamy's Who's Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience don't act funny, be funny... don't worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamy's Who's Got Jokes on TVONE. BET'S One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayan's TBS's Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamy's Who Got Joke's Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 – Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Tom Foss
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: It's hard being funny 24/7, but Josh Sneed does it, and that's why he became a stand-up comedian, to give his humor a “second chance at life.” In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Josh gives tips for people-watching (make sure your flash is off when you're taking pictures), and paints hilarious word caricatures of the people he's seen. Anyone who's been to Long John Silver's or Taco Bell (or the 2-in-1 version), will appreciate Josh's humor.

programme.title: Baby Einstein

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Hybrid Horror!

programme.title: Lunia

programme.title: Moving on up!

programme.title: Brainstorm

programme.title: Olly's Quest For Fame

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes Guardians of the Galaxy: The Thanos Threat
programme.desc: The Guardians of the Galaxy protect the Build Stone. When Thanos, Ronan, Nebula and the Ravagers seek to possess the Build Stone, the fate of the universe depends on the Guardians of the Galaxy to protect it.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Market Day
programme.desc: Each month there is a big market at the Speedor races. Laval and Eris go there, but Cragger has hired the Ravens to steal Laval's precious Speedor. And suddenly the prize of the races, the Golden CHI, has also disappeared.

programme.title: The Littlest Berrykin
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, “The Littlest Berrykin,” into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics. But before leaving, they must choose which of their three princesses (played by Lemon, Raspberry and Strawberry in royal gowns) will rule the kingdom.

programme.title: The Berry Big Relay Race
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the “retrieve” part of the activity—as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search. Orange finds Strawberry, Plum and Raspberry in Lemon's salon, getting their hair and nails done, but something starts going terribly wrong with the appliances.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Sid the Weatherman

programme.title: Special Mom Day Meal
programme.desc: When Sid smells the French toast and his stomach growls, he wonders if his stomach is trying to talk to him. When Sid and his friends investigate at school, they discover that the stomach makes noise when it's getting ready for digestion.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Holiday Special 2022
programme.desc: Blippi and Meekah follow a holiday treasure map and do some fun winter activities.

programme.title: The Berry Best Treasure
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control—life in Berry Bitty City is impossible! Strawberry rallies their spirits by suggesting a fun way for them to spend the day out of town: a treasure hunt! She describes a game where the girls divide into two teams, and each team creates fun written clues for the other that lead to funny objects the girls must collect.

programme.title: The Berry Scary Fun Adventure
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest! Rallied by a sense of competition and adventure, the girls divide into three groups and set up tents—each convinced they will be the bravest group. They each come up with diverting activities to distract themselves.

programme.title: Philip Catherine, Jean-Louis Rassinfosse & Chet Baker
programme.sub-title: Jazz a la Grand Place Chet Baker Trio
programme.desc: Two top-tier Belgian musicians – guitarist Philip Catherine and bassist Jean-Louis Rassinfosse – accompany American jazz trumpeter and vocalist Chet Baker during this 1985 performance at the beautiful Brussels Jazz Club, located on the Grand-Place, the Belgian capital's central square. The trio plays Charlie Mariano's “Crystal Bells”, the title track of their acclaimed 1983 album. Other songs played during this legendary concert include “Down” and “How Deep is the Ocean”.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Art Farmer
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: 3 Cohens sextet
programme.desc: They are three siblings, born in Israel, passed through New York, each leading brilliant careers. The youngest, Avishai, has established himself as one of the most original trumpet players of the moment, author of highly acclaimed albums on the ECM label. The second youngest, Anat, saxophonist and clarinetist, in love with Brazilian music and Benny Goodman, is one of the great "jazzwomen" of today. Less visible, but no less active, the elder Yuval, who plays soprano sax, is one of the most respected musicians in Israeli jazz. Under the name "Three Cohens", they periodically get together for the pleasure of swinging together, as they did as teenagers.

programme.title: John Lee Hooker, Carey Bell, Jimmy Dawkins & Joe Harper
programme.sub-title: John Lee Hooker Live in Paris
programme.desc: In this 1970 performance at Maison de la Radio in Paris, France, American blues legend John Lee Hooker (voice and guitar) is joined by the masterful Carey Bell (harmonica), Joe Harper (bass), Lester Dorsie (drums), and Jimmy Dawkins (electric guitar). From the first to the very last minute of the concert, Hooker illustrates why he, 45 years later, was to be ranked 35th on Rolling Stone's 2015 list of 100 Greatest Guitarists: this bluesman is truly in a class of his own.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Manu Katché, Alfio Origlio, Walter Ricci & Jérôme Regard
programme.sub-title: Katché & Origlio Quartet feat. Walter Ricci
programme.desc: Four exceptional musicians team up to perform classic pop and soul songs made famous by the likes of Gregory Porter, Stevie Wonder, U2, Seal, and many more. Pianist Alfio Origlio signed up to do the arrangements. Walter Ricci, an accomplished jazz vocalist from Naples, eases us into his musical universe with his stunning sensitivity. He is accompanied by an exceptional rhythm section composed of Manu Katché on drums, Jérôme Regard on bass, and Alfio Origlio on piano. This concert was recorded at Festival Jazz au Sommet 2020 in France.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: Michael Brecker Band
programme.sub-title: Michael Brecker Band - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1989, decorated American saxophonist and composer Michael Brecker and his band played at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Accompanied by bassist Jeff Andrews, drummer Adam Nussbaum, pianist Joey Calderazzo, and guitarist Mike Stern, Brecker displayed his virtuosity in spades.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Known outside jazz circles mainly for his film scores, French composer, arranger and pianist Michel Legrand has had a long and storied career in music. Interpreters of his compositions include jazz legends such as Sarah Vaughan, Stan Getz, and Bill Evans, as well as pop stars such as Barbra Streisand and Frank Sinatra. During this 1982 performance in the Belgian town of Spa, Legrand leads his orchestra through a number of original songs, including “The Summer Knows,” “What Are You Doing the Rest of Your Life?” and “Les Moulins de mon Cœur.” Singing either in English or French, Legrand delivers a spirited performance with plenty of romantic flair that is sure to capture your heart.

programme.title: Frans Welser-Möst, Cleveland Orchestra and Chorus, Siobhan Stagg & Avery Amereau
programme.desc: Franz Welser-Möst conducts the Cleveland Orchestra and Chorus in a concert performing Richard Strauss' Metamorphosen (A Study for 23 Solo Strings) and Mozart's Requiem, K. 626. Soloists are Siobhan Stagg (soprano), Avery Amereau (contralto), Ben Bliss (tenor) and Anthony Robin Schneider (bass). Recorded at Severance Hall, Cleveland in March 2023.

programme.title: Simone Lamsma, Gianandrea Noseda & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.desc: Dutch violinist Simone Lamsma brings lyricism and fire to Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's virtuosic Violin Concerto, joining conductor Gianandrea Noseda and the London Symphony Orchestra. Tchaikovsky wrote the piece in 1878 on the shores of Lake Geneva, collaborating closely with his former student and lover, violinist Iosif Kotek. The composer initially intended to dedicate the piece to the young Kotek, but eventually dedicated it to another violinist, Leopold Auer, as he was afraid of the gossip the dedication would cause. This performance was recorded at the Barbican Hall in London, UK, on April 10, 2022.

programme.title: David Grimal
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Roberto Abbado, Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma & Eleonora Buratto
programme.desc: Roberto Abbado conducts the Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, the Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma, and four vocal soloists in an outstanding performance of Giuseppe Verdi's Messa da Requiem, recorded at the Parco Ducale di Parma, Italy as part of Festival Verdi 2020. The soloists are soprano Eleonora Buratto, mezzosoprano Anita Rachvelishvili, tenor Giorgio Berrugi, and bass Roberto Tagliavini. When his fellow composer Gioachino Rossini died in 1868, Verdi proposed to compose a ‘Messa per Rossini' in his honor, to be written by himself and several other Italian composers. Verdi wrote the concluding movement, ‘Libera me'. When the premiere was cancelled, the project lay dormant. When Italian poet Alessandro Manzoni passed away a few years later, Verdi revisited his plan to compose a requiem – this time in honor of the poet he so greatly admired. As an opera composer, Verdi knew better than anyone how to infuse the work with drama, as is evident in the revised version of his ‘Libera me'. The famous, powerful ‘Dies Irae' especially stands out, depicting the horrors of the Last Judgement.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances present Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73. Whereas it took the composer over a decade to complete his first symphony, he penned his Symphony No. 2 in just a few months, during his summer sojourn in the restful Austrian village of Pörtschach in 1877. Nicknamed his ‘Pastoral' symphony, the work is arguably the most sunny and optimistic of Brahms's four symphonies. Lyrical in character, it features joyful melodies. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Carlos Miguel Prieto & Orquesta Sinfónica de Minería
programme.desc: Mahler's Symphony No. 7, nicknamed "Song of the Night," is a five-movement, entirely instrumental work composed during a more optimistic period, featuring unique orchestral colors from instruments like the mandolin, guitar, and euphonium. The work's unique sonic palette, including unusual instrumentation and contrasting timbres, along with its deeply expressive nature and sense of journey, are most valued by the public.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in Antonín Dvořák's spirited Slavonic Dances, Op. 46 (Nos. 1-8). These 16 folk dances earned Dvořák, who was a relative newcomer when he wrote them, great success. Originally composed for piano four hands, the London Symphony Orchestra plays the orchestral version of these brilliant works. This performance was recorded at LSO St. Luke's on Old Street in London, UK, on September 23, 2020.

programme.title: Def Leppard
programme.desc: Sheffield's finest make their long-awaited debut at London's O2m Arena in November 2018. Marking the 31st anniversary of Hysteria they played the whole of the ground breaking album in chronological order featuring hits like Pour Some Sugar on Me, Animal, Women and the title track. They encored with a selection of other classics including When Love and Hate Collide, Let's Get Rocked and Photograph. Another career defining moment from the band capture in 4K video and 5.1 audio.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix
programme.desc: Spotlighting the Jimi Hendrix Experience's appearance at the Miami Pop Festival in 1968, this invaluable documentary features performance footage, home movies, interviews and more.

programme.title: Metallica
programme.sub-title: Orion Festival: Tour Through the Never
programme.desc: Filmed at Orion Festival, Atlantic City, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Metallica featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'One', 'Master Of Puppets', 'Sad But True', 'Seek & Destroy' and many more.

programme.title: Eagles of Death Metal
programme.sub-title: I love You All the Time: Live In Paris
programme.desc: During Eagles Of Death Metal's 13th November 2015 show at the Bataclan concert hall in Paris a very unfortunate, tragic event occurred. On the 16th February, 2016, the band returned to The Olympia in Paris to complete their show. This is no ordinary performance given the tragedy that occurred in the French capital just three months earlier. This stand-out concert sees the band return in honour of the city, providing an emotive and extraordinary live show. Their track Wannabe In L.A. is aptly re-titled for the night to Wannabe In Paris and other highlights include the cover of Duran Duran's hit Save A Prayer.
